array.string:
set -euo pipefail
ROOT="/Users/jvdh/Documents/job-agent" CODEX_BIN="/opt/homebrew/bin/codex" DIGEST_DIR="$ROOT/tracks/core_crypto/digests" LOG_DIR="$ROOT/logs" TODAY="$(date +%F)" DAILY_DIGEST="$DIGEST_DIR/$TODAY.md" LOG_FILE="$LOG_DIR/core_crypto-$TODAY.log"
mkdir -p "$DIGEST_DIR" "$LOG_DIR" exec >>"$LOG_FILE" 2>&1
echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] Starting core_crypto daily run"
cat <<EOF | "$CODEX_BIN" --search -a never exec -C "$ROOT" -s workspace-write - Run the core_crypto job agent for today. EOF
GRAPH_DIR="/Users/jvdh/Documents/logseq" JOURNAL_DIR="$GRAPH_DIR/journals" PAGES_DIR="$GRAPH_DIR/pages" TODAY_LOGSEQ="$(date +%Y_%m_%d)" STAMP="$(date +%Y-%m-%d)" JOURNAL_FILE="$JOURNAL_DIR/$TODAY_LOGSEQ.md" PAGE_NAME="Job Digest $STAMP" PAGE_FILE="$PAGES_DIR/$PAGE_NAME.md"
{ echo "[[job digest]]" echo cat "$DAILY_DIGEST" } > "$PAGE_FILE"
if ! grep -Fqx -- "- New [[${PAGE_NAME}]]" "$JOURNAL_FILE" 2>/dev/null; then { echo echo "- New [[${PAGE_NAME}]]" } >> "$JOURNAL_FILE" fi
echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] Finished core_crypto daily run"
